hca5d526cg6d51g448fg8d63ga6202f6cf4d2: This is a beautiful place - and I can't bloody wait to be free of it.
hdaa44fdbg53d5g43ecgb98cg25e5dbd38f58: You've solved one problem for us. Guess it's on us to solve the next.
he3b0167fg0a75g452eg958bge8f24d323384: Don't... don't say any words over her. Arka wouldn't want that.
hd8c3582eg0c11g43c8gb314g931b2fb90a98: We won. I'd like to think Arka died happy, but... well. Perhaps now she's at peace.
h7f64d96cg9274g479eg8d92gbbcc97d22c9e: I doubt I'd still be drawing breath without your help. Thank you.
h63605f41g693cg4a99g94bdg3a723df952d7: We... we actually did it. We thrashed the lot of them!
h7d372134gf2f4g4294g882eg25877462e2df: Thank you, for talking some sense into me. I'll do my best when the fighting starts.
h3c7dd0a4g11e3g4a48g8e0dg1deeb607e425: Spare me your empty threats and go away, mragreshem.
hbeffb324geaffg4272gb9a7gb352f36c00c5: Can't you just leave me be? This is my last moment of peace.
hdc3a6adagfd8ag4c92g98d6g0de1c546ec13: You'd do better to find somewhere safe than wasting your time on me.
hfa0737f4gbb19g406bga09eg0ca296a351be: 'Kelemvor to judge kindly, Helm to protect -'
hea3284e9g3659g414fg9cddg90a8d7b298ad: Please, leave me be. I said I was busy.
hbaa38efbg665ag4261ga38bg762dad223078: 'Lathander to light, Selûne to guide, Kelemvor to show mercy -'
h19403869g8414g4e20ga45fgd8c2142e0ad6: *You recognise Kelemvor, the Lord of Death. The tiefling thinks he will die soon.*
h03036a92gd6d0g46cdg9764g46a4437b9305: 'Lathander to light, Selûne to guide, Kelemvor to show mercy -'
h2c88e355ga8bfg4ad8g9a96gbd67dfa12dda: *You realise he prays to Kelemvor, Lord of Death.*
hbdeb54bbgc17ag4b66gad4cg70e14e37ea27: What is it? I'm... I'm busy.
h15094f3bg3a56g4697gbb80g99d1171a7f08: Mind if I join you in prayer?
h712d21e7gb490g47cag9868g6603ccff3986: I do mind. This isn't exactly my bravest moment; I'd rather suffer it alone.
hdf1fe829g67a6g4a6cg83d4gd5eb737d134f: I'm no fighter, understand? I'd be useless. Worse; I'd be a liability.
h8513fc5bgc375g4573gb47dg92de324fb021: Many have called me that same word. I have yet to learn its meaning  - or let it stop me from helping my friends.
h44d1d949gb7d5g4b3ega65dg99bf2983243b: I knew I smelled the stink of cowardice.
h51d97dc5g64cfg415ag80a4g0ddd2a8ee244: Kelemvor judges cowards more harshly than others. Better if you die in combat.
h2fd0dbafg1cddg4608g9a8dg18fe8afb32d4: Better if you die in combat then live on as a coward.
hb17e334agc61dg4502g9b96g39cdae08749e: Mrag. Of course I'm going to die... but I might as well get my hands dirty before that.
h93955064gb06fg47fbgadebg7f2c443dea7c: Oh, I'll die today. That much I'm sure of. But I'll do it here, on my own terms. Leave me.
h717ddd43gb929g46bdgb985g9b831e881a2f: I'll kill you myself if you don't grab a weapon and join the line.
h33d1c61dg59b3g461fga5aaga5acf87f8d2c: Mrag. Who needs goblins to be afraid of when we've you for company?
h389c677cg40abg4b69g9ddbg136aa0731fac: Fine. I'll see what I can do. It won't be much - trust me.
h3307d6c2g3726g480bgb6c2g238e9d868345: There's a horde coming for us all. Do you really think I care about your threats?
hc84b8eccge7b1g4a4bga65bga78e82ee7a2c: Leave me spend my final moments how I want.
h6310a8f3g0116g40bcg851bgdad608fe745c: Crazy fool! Are you in a rush to see us all dead?!
heaf9b923g0235g41bdgb4afg9d44b165a437: You have to try. We need every able body, or we're doomed.
hdfad5ce2g68b7g4d80gba17geb25f7268cb5: Damn you... fine. I'll see what I can do. Maybe I'll manage to take a goblin down with me.
h03b561ffg16d4g4118gaeaagfee5ec4552a4: We're doomed either way. Best to stop struggling and hope the end's swift.
h7c7d9092g63d2g46e5gb43ag22e879cc49ac: Songs will be sung for today's heroes. Do your part, and your name will live on.
h929145f4gd05bg4578g912cg4a0747acb082: Mrag. I'd like to see 'Memnos' rhyme in some heroic verse. Fine. I'll help.
ha5db2801g7a74g4327g970bg58157437d3cd: I don't care about my blasted name. The dead don't need compliments from the living. Leave me alone.
hc420ef4agf587g4e43gb600gd0cfcd1247c8: Big words - time to match them with big deeds. Your friends need you.
hc7b38657gd239g4829gb6f6g0c5c7b51b57c: Well, when it's put like that... and from you of all people... all right. I'll do what I can.
h7adb9ba0g9995g4e7cgb652g71421477ef6a: Every fighter was once a novice. Better that than a victim.
hea8d3e9ag57cag4210g809dg2093d830111c: My god abhors cowards. If you do nothing, your fate is sealed in his eyes.
h43f6caa8g834eg422dgab8bge90ad8088139: Damned either way then... but at least I can go out with a weapon in my hand. All right. I'll do what I can.
hc9287dc2g7be7g4fb1gbb3ag61a64acf78dc: Why, because I'm not sharpening steel or strutting on the wall?
h89416d35g7cd8g4230g9e19g8b3ec570dddc: Prayers can wait - you're needed to help with the defences.
hd93b1221g5181g402dgaf7bg15cf573e5869: I can pray a lot better than I can use a bow or a sword.
h8680f2dagd711g4c35gbb9cg14c0efd2e7b6: Why are you praying to the god of the dead?
hdf5e4406g666fg440agab37gd2e5d2f0f553: Well, seems like I'll be facing him before long. All of us will.
h495e9fb5g43f5g43adgb95egb034333e8fe0: Kelemvor's judgement is always fair. You're wasting your time trying to curry his favour.
h9917bc17g52b0g4a3fg843fg0da54dec4b56: Prayer's all I've got right now. And best to pray to the god I'm liable to meet soon.
